description: Injects a response-language instruction into context on every user prompt

hooks.command: LANG_OPT="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_OPTION_RESPONSE_LANGUAGE:-$ZN_RESPONSE_LANGUAGE}"; if [ -n "$LANG_OPT" ]; then echo "Always respond to the user in $LANG_OPT, regardless of the language of their message. Keep technical terms and code identifiers in their original form (commit, pull request, function names, flags, etc.). Maintain full orthographic correctness for $LANG_OPT, including all required diacritics and special characters; never substitute them with ASCII lookalikes."; fi
